Global (All).title: Racial Tensions in the US
Global (All).summary: Protests and violence erupt in major US cities after latest police brutality incident.

Global (All).title: Global Economic Uncertainty
Global (All).summary: COVID-19 pandemic and trade tensions lead to widespread economic instability worldwide.

Global (All).title: Social Media Regulation Proposals
Global (All).summary: Governments considering stricter rules on social media platforms to combat misinformation and protect users.

United States.title: Rise in COVID-19 cases due to new Omicron subvariant BA.2.3.2 in US
United States.summary: The Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) announced that COVID-19 cases have increased in the US, primarily due to the spread of the new Omicron subvariant BA.2.3.2.

United States.title: Gunman opens fire in Sacramento, California, killing 6 and injuring 12
United States.summary: On April 3, a gunman opened fire in a Sacramento neighborhood, killing six people and injuring 12 others. This incident highlights ongoing concerns about gun violence in the US.

United States.title: Massive Twitter Data Breach Exposes Personal Data of 5.4 Million Users in the US
United States.summary: A major data breach on the social media platform Twitter has exposed the personal data of 5.4 million users in the US and around the globe. This incident raises concerns about online security and data protection.

South Korea.title: North Korea missile launches
South Korea.summary: North Korea test-fired multiple missiles in the past week, heightening tensions on the Korean Peninsula. South Korea and the US remain on high alert for any further provocations.

South Korea.title: Protests over 'comfort women' agreement
South Korea.summary: Demonstrations have erupted in South Korea over the recent agreement between Seoul and Tokyo regarding 'comfort women' during World War II. The agreement has sparked anger among some South Koreans who believe it favors Japan's narrative.

South Korea.title: Cybersecurity concerns over smart home appliances
South Korea.summary: South Korean authorities have expressed concerns about the security risks associated with smart home appliances, particularly from Chinese and other foreign manufacturers. The government is urging citizens to be vigilant and report any suspicious activity.

Japan.title: Japan's Defense Minister Resigns Amid Row Over Military Spending
Japan.summary: Japan's defense minister has resigned amid a row over the country's military spending. The move highlights tensions within the government over military reform and spending increases.

Japan.title: Japan's Economy Experiences Slowdown Amid COVID-19 Rebound
Japan.summary: Japan's economy has experienced a slowdown as the country struggles to recover from the COVID-19 pandemic. The slowdown is expected to be short-term.

Japan.title: Protesters Clash with Police in Tokyo During Japanese Prime Minister's Visit
Japan.summary: Protesters clashed with police in Tokyo during a visit by Japanese Prime Minister Fumio Kishida. The protesters were demonstrating against the government's policies and COVID-19 measures.
